title: Domain types for context optimization
acceptance_criteria: QueryComplexity ADT with 5 constructors (Focused, ModuleLevel, CrossModule, Architectural, Exploratory)
ContextBudget type with token budget, graph ratio, and complexity level
SelectedContext type containing selected nodes, edges, communities, bridge nodes, god nodes
ConversationNode type with convId, convQuestion, convSummary, convTimestamp, convRelevantNodes, convTokensUsed
ConversationEdge type linking conversations to code nodes
All types have ToJSON/FromJSON instances where appropriate
All types are in Domain layer (no IO)
